overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City during golden hour. The player moves from a covered pedestrian terrace through crowded walkways and plazas, passing futuristic skyscrapers with neon signage, and ends by crossing a bridge with a view of a burning car. The scene features dense atmospheric smoke, warm sunset lighting mixed with neon artificial lights, and a dense crowd of NPC pedestrians.

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs to lower level

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered terrace area with palm trees, moving toward the edge overlooking the city skyline

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking in same direction through the covered walkway

entered.detail: large concrete overhang structure providing partial cover
tall glass and steel skyscrapers with neon accents visible in the distance
tropical palm trees in planters along the walkway
glowing pink and blue neon signs on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a large concrete terrace structure with partial sky visibility. The camera walks forward through moderate crowds of pedestrians, passing palm trees on the left while the futuristic city skyline glows in the warm golden hour light ahead. Around 6.5 seconds, the camera begins descending stairs to a lower level.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower pedestrian walkway with outdoor seating

events.description: exits covered terrace into open air lower walkway with direct sunset lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down a concrete ramp and continuing along a lower pedestrian walkway with billboards visible

notable_agents.action: pedestrian sitting at outdoor table under large umbrella

entered.detail: multi-level highway overpass with green structural elements
large colorful digital advertisement screen showing animated graphics
tables and chairs with large umbrellas along the walkway
large art-deco inspired building with prominent HOTEL signage

segments.scene_description: Having descended from the terrace, the scene opens into a sunlit lower walkway with full sky visibility. The camera passes digital billboards on the left and outdoor seating areas on the right, while the distinctive hotel building becomes visible in the distance. The lighting shifts to warm direct sunlight as the covered structure is left behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market corridor with vendor stalls

events.description: enters covered market area with dense crowds and vendor stalls
exits covered market into open plaza space

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dense crowd in a covered market corridor, passing vendor stalls on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket with glowing headgear walking toward camera

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure covering the walkway with hanging signage
food and goods vendors with illuminated displays under awnings

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a densely populated covered market corridor with overhead structures blocking part of the sky. Vendor stalls line the right side while crowds of pedestrians move in opposing directions. Around 24 seconds, the scene transitions to a more open plaza area as the market structure ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with hotel frontage

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the tall skyscrapers and pink starburst structure atop one building

agents.ego_description: walking through a crowded open plaza, looking up at the towering buildings and neon signage

notable_agents.action: crowd of pedestrians crossing the plaza in various directions

entered.detail: wide open paved area with scattered planters and digital kiosks
tall skyscraper with distinctive pink glowing starburst structure on the roof

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban plaza bathed in golden hour sunlight. The camera moves through dense crowds while the hotel building shifts to the left side of the frame. A distinctive skyscraper with a pink glowing starburst on top dominates the center background. The camera tilts upward around 32 seconds to emphasize the scale of the towering structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level approach to waterfront bridge

events.description: crossing the street at crosswalk, moving from plaza to bridge approach
sunset becomes more prominent with strong backlighting as camera faces west

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and approaching a bridge walkway with the setting sun visible ahead

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along the street below the hotel

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian bridge structure leading over the water
large amusement park ferris wheel silhouetted against the sunset
tall modern street lighting poles along the roadway

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street at a crosswalk, transitioning from the plaza to a bridge approach. The hotel building recedes into the left background while a ferris wheel becomes visible against the bright sunset sky ahead. Sparse vehicle traffic moves along the street below as the lighting shifts to strong backlit conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge walkway with waterfront view

events.description: approaching and passing a burning wrecked car on the bridge walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated bridge walkway toward a burning car, with sunset reflecting off water to the right

entered.detail: elevated concrete pedestrian walkway with metal railings
canal or bay water reflecting the golden sunset light
wrecked vehicle engulfed in flames with thick black smoke, appearing around 55 seconds
illuminated signage for WILD BLUE establishment

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place on an elevated bridge walkway with the setting sun creating a bright glare on the water to the right. The camera moves forward along the concrete path, passing street lamps and approaching a burning wrecked car that appears around 55 seconds, emitting thick black smoke. The wild blue sign becomes visible on the right as the hotel and ferris wheel fade from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic urban center that transitions from sheltered pedestrian terraces into a wide, sun-drenched plaza and finally onto an elevated bridge. It begins under a concrete terrace structure, moving through crowds and past palm trees before descending stairs into a sunlit lower walkway lined with digital billboards and outdoor seating. The camera then pushes through a densely populated covered market corridor, which gradually opens into a wide urban plaza where the view expands to reveal a towering skyscraper topped with a pink glowing starburst. As the camera crosses a street, the scene shifts toward a bridge approach with a ferris wheel silhouetted against the bright sunset sky. Finally, the movement leads onto an elevated concrete walkway where the golden hour glare reflects off the water, ending as the camera approaches a wrecked car emitting thick black smoke.
